Privacy & Cookie Choices
We use essential storage for app features, plus optional analytics and ad personalization. You can manage choices anytime from here.
Privacy Preferences
Regional ad rules (EEA/UK/US states) are handled in-app via Google consent. You can also manage local choices below.
Essential Storage Always On
Required for tasbih counts, language selection, and app settings.
Helps improve app quality and fix crashes faster.
Allow tailored ad relevance where permitted by your region and consent.
Privacy policy: Open policy
